fixture_notice: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN NON-EVIDENTIARY: method-profile serialization fixture only.
unit_of_analysis: One constructed case paired with one candidate organization rule.
procedure: Read only the frozen constructed-case fields.
Apply the Organization K rule without importing an Organization R assumption.
Apply the Organization R rule without importing an Organization K assumption.
Record identity, cardinality, context, and classification commitments separately.
Retain constraint failures, unresolved classifications, and non-execution dispositions.
adjudication: Deterministic field matching against the frozen category rules; no participant judgment, model inference, or external source is used.
coverage: Include at least one straightforward positive case for each organization, one deliberately invalid or underspecified case, and all declared boundary cases.
interpretation_boundary: A serialized match is a fixture-processing outcome, not evidence that either organization is correct or preferable.
